opinion.h: Thomas R. PURMAN, petitioner, v. Alice A. SMITH.* No. 336.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Thomas R. Purman, pro se.
For opinion below, see 126 Pa.Super. 234, 191 A. 65.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Superior Court of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania denied.
* Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 776, 58 S. Ct. 137, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Purman v. Smith 302 U.S. 726 (1937) ]
